subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He in Whose hand is the Kingdom of the heavens and of the earth, and verily He hath knowledge of all things. His is the bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی بیده ملکوت ملک السموات و الارض و انه کان بکل شیء علیما له الجود
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @suffering and imprisonment
